descriptions: Tests layout rendering and responsiveness of the chatbox
Verifies proper display across different screen sizes and zoom levels
Ensures consistent layout during browser window state changes

test_view_points.expected_result:
Layout is displayed as design:
+ Position
+ Initialization value
+ List contact
+ Input Text box
+ Search 
+ Menu

test_view_points.test_view_point:
Verify layout of chatbox when do:
+ Zoom in
+ Zoom out
test_view_points.expected_result:
+ Layout of screen isn't broken
+ The screen is zoom in / zoom out at the right rate
+ Zoom out up to 500%
+ Zoom in at least 25%

test_view_points.test_view_point:
Verify layout of chatbox when do: 
+ Maximize on broswer
+ Minimize on broswer
test_view_points.expected_result:
+ Layout of screen isn't broken 
+ The screen is maximize / minimize at the right rate

descriptions: Tests proper display of usernames including Japanese honorifics

test_view_points.expected_result:

descriptions: Tests avatar image display and default fallbacks

Ensures proper image scaling and cropping behavior

test_view_points.test_view_point: Verify that the avatar image isn't cropped off
test_view_points.expected_result: The avatar image should be fully displayed

test_view_points.test_view_point: Verify that the quality of the avatar image isn't changed after uploading the image
test_view_points.expected_result: The quality of the avatar image shouldn't be changed after uploading the image

descriptions: Tests different user status states and their display

descriptions: Tests initialization and basic character input functionality
Validates handling of different character types including full-width, special characters, and emojis
Tests file attachment handling and display
Verifies space character handling and trimming behavior

test_view_points.test_view_point: Verify display initialization of input text area
test_view_points.expected_result:
+ Input text area is displayed as design
+ Place Holder is "Type a message here"

test_view_points.test_view_point: Verify that user is able to type characters into the chat textarea
test_view_points.expected_result:
+ User should be able to type characters into input text area
+ Place Holder "Type a message here" is cleared

test_view_points.test_view_point:
Verify handle when input data into input text area
+ Input = N + 1 characters (multi lines)
+ Input = N characters (multi lines)
+ Input = N -1 characters (multi lines)
(N: Max value is depended on the SRS)
test_view_points.expected_result:
+ Can't input more than N characters into input text area
+ Scroll bar is display to view all content
(Depending on the SRS)

test_view_points.test_view_point:
Verify input below data into input text area: 
+ Fullsize alphanumeric (１，２，ｐ，ｄ，Ａ，Ｒ，Ｋ)
+ Decimal (0.1, 1.2..)
+ Format date time (20190528)
test_view_points.expected_result:
At conversation box: 
+ Message is sent successfully
+ Format is displayed correctly
+ Number is displayed correctly

test_view_points.test_view_point:
Verify input below data into input text area: 
+ Special character (!, @, #, <>, ,...)
+ Alphabet character
+ Fullsize character (hiragana, katakana)
+ Half size character
test_view_points.expected_result:
At conversation box: 
+ Message is sent successfully
+ Format is displayed correctly
+ Character is displayed correctly with inputted characters

test_view_points.test_view_point:
Verify input below data into input text area: 
+ Emoji
+ Icon
+ Gif
+ Character & emoji
test_view_points.expected_result:
At conversation box: 
+ Message is sent successfully
+ Format is displayed correctly
+ Emoji/Icon/Gif is displayed correctly with inputted data.
+ Position of Emoji/Icon/Gif displayed correctly

test_view_points.test_view_point:
Verify input below data into input text area: 
+ Attached file (many types)
+ Attached file & emoji & character
test_view_points.expected_result:
At conversation box: 
+ Message is sent successfully
+ Thumbnail of attached file is displayed correctly
+ Capacity of attached file is displayed correctly
+ Name of attached file is displayed correctly

test_view_points.test_view_point:
Verify input below data into input text area: 
+ URL
+ SQL injection
+ HTML code (Ex: "&amp", "")
test_view_points.expected_result:
At conversation box:
+ Message is sent successfully
+ Format is displayed correctly
+ URL/SQL injection/HTML is displayed correctly with inputted data.

test_view_points.test_view_point:
Verify input below data into input text area: 
+ Not input
+ Space half size
+ Input multiple lines of space characters without text
test_view_points.expected_result:
+ Button Send is disable 
+ At input text area: scrollbar isn't displayed and resize

test_view_points.test_view_point:
Verify input below data into input text area: 
+ Space fullsize
test_view_points.expected_result: Behavior base on spec: same as halfsize space or same as normal text

test_view_points.test_view_point: Verify handle when input spaces characters at the begin/end of string into input text area
test_view_points.expected_result:
+ Message is auto TRIM spaces at the begin/end of string
+ At conversation box: Message is displayed don't have space at the begin/end of string

+  Attached file & emoji & character

test_view_points.expected_result: The message should be sent and displayed normally

later sent message will be displayed later

+ Send message for many days

+ Icon

test_view_points.expected_result:
Open calling screen that layout as design:
+ Layout, color, style...

+ Calling: connect to the particular person with calling ring tone and callers name.

+ The next time recipient does accept calls
test_view_points.expected_result:
Open calling screen that layout as design:

test_view_points.expected_result:
User can't calling multi video at the same time
(Depending on the SRS)

Verify that the User name is displayed correctly when
+ User who has a long name
+ User name is haflsize
+ Username is fullsize
+ Username which contains special characters
Ex: html code, %$%&#*((&&$$, symbols... )
test_view_points.expected_result:
+ The Username should be displayed correctly on the header bar 
+ Display "さ ん" ／ "様" after partner's username

test_view_points.expected_result: The default image should be displayed correctly

test_view_points.expected_result:
+ The image file displayed should be the same as the one uploaded
+ The avatar image isn't cropped off
+ The quality of the avatar image shouldn't be changed after uploading the image

test_view_points.test_view_point:
Verify display when 
+ Call 1 person before particular person accepts
test_view_points.expected_result:
Open calling screen that UI are the same with design:
+ layout, color, style... 
+ Icon: video, mic, end call, add person, quality of internet, message, contact, full screen...
+ Connect to the particlular person with calling ring tone
+ Video Frame of caller: display image of caller by webcam.
+ Video Frame of the particular person: display avatar and name.

test_view_points.test_view_point:
Verify display when 
+ Call a group before particular person accepts
test_view_points.expected_result:
Open calling screen that UI are the same with design:
+ layout, color, style... 
+ Icon: video, mic, end call, add person, quality of internet, message, contact, full screen...
+ Connect to the particlular person with calling ring tone
+ Video Frame of caller: display image of caller by webcam.
+ Video Frame of the particular persons: display avatar and name of each persion in group. Each member has 1 frame

test_view_points.test_view_point:
Verify handle when do:
+ Call is finished by recipient
+ Call is cancelled by sender 
+ Recipient doesn't accept calls
test_view_points.expected_result:
+ Call is cancel/finish sucessfully.
+ User and Partner can't connection
+ User/ Partner can recall normally
+ On the conversation box: Message "Notice that a call has been canceled"/"Notice that there is a missed call" is displayed

test_view_points.test_view_point: Verify handle after call video sucessfully
test_view_points.expected_result:
+ On the conversation box: Message "The video call within ... ended at ..." is displayed
+ User/ Partner can recall normally

test_view_points.test_view_point:
Verify handle when displaying video call icon on computer 
+ Has webcam
+ Hasn't webcam
test_view_points.expected_result:
Computer or Device that have/haven't webcame/ camera. Display correctly popup as designed:
+ Position: <Position>
+ Symbol: <image>
+ Tooltip: <text>
+ Icon is active/inactive

test_view_points.test_view_point: Verify handle when video call the caller has Camera while the recipient has no camera
test_view_points.expected_result:
+ The recipient still sees the image of the caller
+ The caller can't see the image of the recipient
+ The call is still performed normally

test_view_points.test_view_point: Verify handle when calling then internet connection is failed
test_view_points.expected_result:
+ The call is stopped
+ The caller & recipient can't see each other
+ The call is automatically reconnected when internet connection returns to normal

test_view_points.expected_result:
+ Go to edit file name popup
+ Can edit file name successfully

test_view_points.test_view_point: Verify handle when select on button Delete
test_view_points.expected_result:
+ Confirm popup is displayed. 
+ Have 2 button: Cancel AND Delete

test_view_points.test_view_point:
Verify handle when on popup confirm delete
+ User clicking on the Cancel button
test_view_points.expected_result:
+ The Delete popup should closed
+ File isn't deleted

test_view_points.test_view_point:
Verify handle when on popup confirm delete
+ User clicking on the Delete button
test_view_points.expected_result:
+ The Delete popup should closed
+ File is deleted
+ At conversation box: File is deleted, too

test_view_points.test_view_point:
Verify handle when click below buttons many times
+ Send
+ Add File
+ Edit 
+ Quote
+ Copy/Paste
+ Unread
+ Video Call
+ Contact List
+ Add Contact
+ Add to group
test_view_points.expected_result:
+ Only one send processing
+ Popup/ message isn't duplicated
+ The chatbox screen isn't happens stalled

test_view_points.test_view_point:
Verify time when send message but internet connection is failed
+ Send
+ Add File
+ Edit 
+ Quote
+ Copy/Paste
+ Unread
+ Video Call
+ Contact List
+ Add Contact
+ Add to group
test_view_points.expected_result:
+Warning message "Please wait... The internet is having problems." is displayed
+ No action will be executed until the internet reconnects normally

test_view_points.test_view_point:
Verify handle when just sent message for user A then internet disconnect. (user don't know)
After that, change to chat with user B
test_view_points.expected_result:
+ Content message sent for user A just display on conversation of user A
+ Content message sent for user A isn't display on conversation of user B
+ After internet is reconnect: 
    . Content message sent for user A sucessfully 
    . Content message just display on conversation of user A

test_view_points.test_view_point: Verify time when received message but internet connection is failed
test_view_points.expected_result:
+ Sent message isn't displayed 
+ Displayed time on conversation box is time received successfully (internet connection is good)

test_view_points.test_view_point:
Verify realtime when received message in the case:
The first: internet connection is failed
The second: internet connection is good
test_view_points.expected_result:
+ Time is displayed correctly with real time of server/local  
+ Real time is displayed as format hh:mm 
(Depending on the SRS)

test_view_points.test_view_point:
Verify handle when:
+ Upload 1 file & continue upload another file
+ Upload multi files with the same format and same time
+ Upload multi files that are different format at the same time
+ Drag and drop 1 file 
+ Drag and drop multi file
test_view_points.expected_result:
File is uploaded successfully & correctly
+ Number: number of selected files
+ Position: bottom of chat box. The latest file is under.
+ Name file: the same with original file
+ Capacity:the same with original file
+ Style: highlight and active.

test_view_points.test_view_point: Verify handle when send message in the case service is error after that service return normal
test_view_points.expected_result:
+ Send message isn't duplicated
+ Received message isn't duplicated.
+ All functions work normally
